item.title: Philadelphia men repeatedly traveled to Minneapolis to carry out $3.5M housing fraud scheme: DOJ
item.description: Pennsylvania fraudsters pleaded guilty to stealing about $3.5 million from Minnesota housing program after traveling to exploit Medicaid beneficiaries...

item.title: Sydney Sweeney rings stock exchange opening bell alongside American Eagle CEO
item.description: Sydney Sweeney joined American Eagle executives including CEO Jay Schottenstein to ring the opening bell at the New York Stock Exchange on Monday.

item.title: Dow closes above 50,000 for first time
item.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average topped 50,000 points for the first time ever Friday. The index rebounded following a tech stock sell-off earlier in t...

item.title: Stellantis takes massive $26B hit after moving away from EVs
item.description: Stellantis shares plunged after announcing a massive writedown, raising questions about whether EV struggles stem from market issues or vehicle appeal...

item.title: Citi to match federal government's $1K Trump Account contributions for employees' children
item.description: Citi announced it will match the federal government's $1,000 deposits to Trump Accounts for children born to U.S. workers between January 2025 and Dec...
